response.justification: Bogdan possesses significant staff-level software engineering experience, excelling in full-stack development, cloud infrastructure, and technical leadership. While his current role demonstrates highly relevant experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, the explicit duration of his production-grade AI solutions experience is considerably less than the required eight years. His strong foundational skills and leadership warrant further consideration despite the specific AI experience gap.
strengths: Staff-level technical leadership and mentorship experience.
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows.
Strong background in full-stack, cloud (AWS/Kubernetes), and high-performance systems.
concerns: Limited explicit experience (approx. 1 year) in building production-grade AI solutions compared to the 8-year requirement.
Lack of explicit mention of Python, vector databases, or RAG architectures.
No clear demonstration of building evaluation pipelines or observability frameworks specifically for AI systems.
